segments.text: At that aggressive stage, you want to really extend that advantage
segments.original_text: 攻めさせる段階でそのリードを広げていきたいでしょうから

segments.text: First, they need to secure a stock
segments.original_text: まずは1ストック欲しいところ
ただこれは使われてしまって

full_text: At that aggressive stage, you want to really extend that advantage First, they need to secure a stock But that just got spent
